title: masdevallia × strumella
intro: Masdevallia × strumella is a hybrid orchid plant, resulting from the cross between Masdevallia and Dracula orchid species. The medicinal properties of this plant include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a subject of interest in traditional medicine. The health benefits associated with Masdevallia × strumella are not extensively documented, but it has been used in some cultures to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Masdevallia × strumella typically involve infusions of the plant's leaves or roots, which are steeped in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
